{{CargoRelic
|name=Scrap Cans
|class_id=20428
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Following the world's destruction, what currency will dominate the economic system? One opinion we got is Nuka-Cola bottle cap, and our own answer is the aluminum can! As for why they are both part of the packaging for carbonated drinks... Well, that's a story for another day!
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=19
|tech=11
|ss1=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +10<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss2=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +20<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss3=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +30<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss4=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +30<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss7=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +30<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
